title: Dashboard Workbench Layout and Todo I18n
goal: Refine the pantheon-base dashboard workbench layout so quick-action and domain-overview cards share a balanced visual model, and localize unified todo labels from machine-readable backend fields.

in: frontend dashboard layout and card sizing in the platform dashboard
frontend unified todo localization fallback and routing behavior
backend dashboard todo response fields for issue, action, and route metadata
targeted platform tests and dashboard smoke coverage
out: unrelated IAM, role, permission, and seed changes already present in the worktree
menu ownership changes outside dashboard navigation

commands: node scripts/run-smoke-suite.mjs --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5175 --config playwright.config.ts -- tests/smoke/platform/backoffice-ui-visual.spec.ts --grep "/dashboard has unified shell and no runtime UI regression"

node scripts/run-smoke-suite.mjs --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5175 --config playwright.config.ts -- tests/smoke/system/system-pages.spec.ts --grep "dashboard keeps narrow reflow stable and task widgets ready"
runtimeEvidence: dashboard unified todo narrow viewport smoke

completionChecklist: Dashboard visual parity verified with a rendered screenshot
Unified todo localization verified against smoke coverage
